resources.string: Abhi koi gahak nahi.\n\nPehla gahak shamil karne aur apna khata shuru karne ke liye neeche "Party Shamil Karein" dabayen.
Meherbani kar ke durust raqam likhein
Delete ki hui cheezein 30 din rakhi jati hain, phir hamesha ke liye mit jati hain.
Party (is ki entries isi ke saath mehfooz hain)
\"%1$s\" ko wapas layen? Is ke khata entries bhi wapas aa jayengi.
Ye entry wapas layen? Ye party ke khate mein dobara aayegi aur balance par asar dalegi.
Bin ki har cheez hamesha ke liye delete ho jayegi. Ye wapas nahi ho sakta.
\"%1$s\" aur is ki entries Recycle Bin mein chali jayengi. 30 din ke andar wapas la sakte hain.
Ye entry Recycle Bin mein chali jayegi. 30 din ke andar wapas la sakte hain.
Recycle Bin mein muntaqil ho gaya
Party delete karne ke liye usey der tak dabayen
Sirf rehnumai ke liye — fatwa nahi

Ye sahulat sirf rehnumai ke liye hai. Zakat ki fiqhi tafseel ahem hai — nisab ka miyaar, mashkook qarzon ka hukm, qamari saal, aur kaun si adaigiyan minha hongi, in sab mein ulama ki raaye mukhtalif hai. Roshan Khata mufti nahi hai. Hatmi hukm kisi mustanad aalim se zaroor lein.
Yahan nisab chandi ke miyaar (612.36 gram) par rakha gaya hai — ye mauqif aam tor par ghareebon ke haq mein zyada mohtat samjha jata hai. Aaj ki chandi ki fi gram qeemat likhein.
Nisab maloom karne ke liye chandi ki qeemat likhein
Aap ka maal nisab ko pahunch gaya hai — Zakat wajib hai (basharte qamari saal mukammal ho).
Aap ka maal nisab se kam hai — is raqam par Zakat wajib nahi.
Haath mein naqdi, bank balance, aur tijarati maal ki qeemat. Roshan Khata inhe nahi dekh sakta, is liye khud likhein.
Jo aap ne doosron ko dena hai: %1$s (minha)
Bohat se ulama ke nazdeek mashkook qarz ki Zakat wasool hone par wajib hoti hai. Ye sirf us waqt lagayen jab aap zyada ehtiyat chahein.
Zakat ke liye maal par poora qamari saal (hawl) guzarna bhi shart hai. Roshan Khata is ka hisaab nahi rakhta — is ka khayal khud rakhein, aur hukm kisi aalim se tasdeeq karein.
Tijarat se alag nishan zad. Is par kabhi sood ya takheeri fees nahi lagti.
Bhejne se pehle parh lein. Yahan kuch bhi badal sakte hain — Roshan Khata isey WhatsApp ya SMS app ko dega, aur bhejne ka button aap khud dabayenge.

Assalam-o-Alaikum %1$s,

Aap ke zimme %2$s baqi hai. Meherbani farma kar jab mumkin ho ada kar dein. Agar aap ada kar chuke hain to is paighaam ko nazar-andaz karein aur humein bata dein.

JazakAllah.

—
Roshan Khata ke zariye bheja gaya

Assalam-o-Alaikum %1$s,

Hamare zimme aap ka %2$s baqi hai. InshaAllah jald ada kar denge. Agar aap ka hisaab hum se mukhtalif ho to bata dein.

JazakAllah.

—
Roshan Khata ke zariye bheja gaya
Is party ka phone number mehfooz nahi. Pehle number shamil karein.
Is phone par WhatsApp maujood nahi.
Is phone par koi SMS app nahi mili.
Kuch baqi nahi — hisaab barabar hai.
Agar is entry ke saath maal bhi gaya — 5 bori urea, 2 litre zehar — to yahan likhein. Sada naqad entry ke liye khali chhor dein.
Naam ya number se talash karein
Is phone par koi contact nahi mila.
Aap ki talash se koi contact nahi milta.

Roshan Khata aap ki contact list sirf yahan dikhane ke liye parhega, taake aap chun sakein kise shamil karna hai. Kuch bhi upload nahi hota, aur sirf wahi contacts mehfooz hote hain jo aap khud chunein — sirf un ka naam aur number.\n\nAgar aap na chahein to har party haath se bhi shamil kar sakte hain.
Ijazat nahi mili, is liye contacts nahi dikhaye ja sakte. Aap home screen se partiyan haath se shamil kar sakte hain.
Statement nahi ban saki. Dobara koshish karein.
Abhi statement mein dalne ke liye koi entry nahi.
Aap ka khata niji hai. Tasdeeq karein ke ye aap hain.
App Lock on hai. Har baar app kholne par tasdeeq maangi jayegi.
Aap ke fingerprint, chehre, ya phone ke maujooda screen lock se kaam leta hai. Roshan Khata apna koi PIN mehfooz nahi karta — Android isey hum se zyada mehfooz rakhta hai.
Is phone par koi screen lock nahi. Pehle phone ki settings mein fingerprint, PIN ya pattern lagayen, phir App Lock aap ke khate ki hifazat kar sakega.
Is phone par App Lock dastyab nahi.
Statement par aap ka naam aur payment code
Har statement ke oopar aur har yaad dehani ke aakhir mein aata hai.
Aap ke EasyPaisa ya JazzCash QR code ka screenshot ya tasveer. Ye statement ke saath lagega taake gahak scan kar ke aap ko adaigi kar sake.

Mehfooz karne se pehle code ghor se dekh lein. Roshan Khata ye tasdeeq nahi kar sakta ke QR kis ke account ka hai — agar ghalat tasveer mehfooz hui to gahak ki adaigi ghalat account mein jayegi.\n\nYe bhi jaan lein: zaati EasyPaisa/JazzCash QR mein raqam shamil nahi hoti. Gahak raqam khud likhega, is liye raqam saath saaf likhi jati hai.
Abhi koi payment QR mehfooz nahi.
Ye tasveer mehfooz nahi ho saki. Doosri chunein.
Oopar code dekhein aur tasdeeq karein ke ye aap hi ka EasyPaisa ya JazzCash account hai. Agar nahi, to aap ke gahakon ki adaigiyan kisi aur ko pahunchengi.
Abhi koi cheque nahi.\n\nBaad ki tareekh ke cheque yahan khate se alag rakhe jate hain — cheque us waqt tak raqam nahi jab tak cash na ho jaye.
Cheque cash hone tak raqam nahi, is liye ye abhi balance ko nahi chhuyega. Jab aap isey clear nishan zad karenge, tab adaigi khate mein darj hogi.
%1$d cheque bank le jane ke liye tayyar
Clear nishan zad karne se adaigi %1$s ke khate mein darj hogi aur balance badlega. Ye sirf us waqt karein jab raqam waqai account mein aa jaye.
Bounce cheque adaigi nahi — raqam badastoor wajib rehti hai. Khate mein kuch darj nahi hoga.
Clear — adaigi khate mein darj ho gayi
Bounce nishan zad hua. Raqam ab bhi wajib hai.
Pehle apni list se gahak ya supplier chunein.
Meherbani kar ke cheque par likhi tareekh chunein.
Naam ya number se talash karein
Note, maal ya hawala talash karein
Jin ka main zyada maqrooz pehle
Aap ki talash se koi gahak ya supplier nahi milta.
Aap ki talash se koi entry nahi milti.
%2$d mein se %1$d dikhaye ja rahe hain
Rawan balance khate ki apni tarteeb par chalta hai, is liye aap jaise bhi tarteeb dein ya talash karein, ye durust rehta hai.
Ye tasveer mehfooz nahi ho saki. Doosri chunein.
Tasveer isi phone par rehti hai. Kabhi upload nahi hoti, aur jaan boojh kar statement par nahi lagai jati — statement aage bheji jati hai, aur aap ke gahak ne apni tasveer ke safar ki ijazat nahi di.
Zyada se zyada jitna udhaar aap is party ko dena chahte hain. Hadd se barhne wali entry se pehle Roshan Khata aap ko khabardar karega.
Hadd (Rs) — baghair hadd ke liye khali chhorein
Ye sirf intebah hai, rukawat nahi. Karobar aap ka hai — aap hamesha aage barh sakte hain.
Is waqt aap ke %1$s wajib hain
Udhaar ki hadd hata di gayi
Udhaar ki hadd mehfooz ho gayi
Ye un ki udhaar ki hadd se barh jayega

%1$s ke zimme is waqt %2$s hain.

%3$s ki ye entry unhein %4$s par le jayegi, jo aap ki muqarrar karda %5$s hadd se zyada hai.

Aap phir bhi aage barh sakte hain — ye sirf intebah hai.
Is muddat mein koi entry nahi.
Oopar ke teen adaad sirf is muddat ke hain. Neeche ikhtitami balance poora hisaab hai — %1$s — kyunke juzwi muddat ka majmua wo nahi jo aap ke gahak ke zimme hai.
Aakhri tareekh shuru ki tareekh se pehle nahi ho sakti.
Karobari raqam ki aamad o kharch
Cashbook aap ke gahak khate se alag hai. Kiraya, tankhwahein, naqad farokht — wo raqam jis ka koi gahak nahi. Is se kisi ke zimme kuch nahi badalta.
Cashbook mein abhi koi entry nahi.\n\nYe us raqam ke liye hai jo kisi gahak se judi nahi — kiraya, bijli, tankhwahein, tel, naqad farokht.
Ye Recycle Bin mein chali jayegi.
Aap ka khata, aap ke haath mein

Sab kuch — gahak, khata, cheque, cashbook, aur Recycle Bin — ek file mein likha jata hai jise aap Drive mein mehfooz kar sakte hain, khud ko WhatsApp kar sakte hain, ya memory card par rakh sakte hain.\n\nFile sada, parhne ke qabil text hai. Barson baad bhi, is app ke baghair bhi, aap ka record bazyab ho sakega. Jo data hamari madad ke baghair wapas na mil sake wo haqeeqat mein aap ka nahi.
Roshan Khata sab kuch sirf isi phone par rakhta hai. Phone gum ho, toot jaye, ya app uninstall ho to record bhi saath jata hai. Meherbani kar ke baqaidgi se backup lein aur kahin aur mehfooz rakhein.
Backup tayyar — mehfooz karne ki jagah chunein

Bahali Roshan Khata mein maujood har cheez ko is file ke mawad se badal degi:

%1$d gahak/supplier
%2$d khata entries
%3$d cheque
%4$d cashbook entries
%5$d adaigi mansoobay
%6$d supplier bill

Jo kuch is phone par ab hai wo chala jayega. Agar yahan aisi entries hain jo backup mein nahi, to pehle IS ka backup lein.

Ye wapas nahi ho sakta.
Mansooba ek bandobast hai, naya qarz nahi. Jo un ke zimme hai wo pehle hi khate mein hai. Yahan adaigi darj karne se wo khate mein ek baar jati hai — kabhi do baar shumar nahi hoti.
Abhi koi adaigi mansooba nahi.\n\nYe us waqt kaam aate hain jab gahak raqam qiston mein ada karega — fasal ke baad, ya chand mahinon mein.
Jo is party ke zimme pehle se hai usey ada karne ka bandobast banayen. Is se un ke balance mein izafa nahi hota — sirf ye darj hota hai ke unhon ne kitna aur kab dena mana hai.
Un ke zimme is waqt %1$s hain
Is party ke zimme abhi kuch nahi
Is se %1$s ke khate mein ek entry hogi, jo un ka wajib kam karegi. Do baar shumar nahi hota.
Adaigi darj ho kar khate mein chali gayi
Ye adaigi mansoobay ki baqi raqam (%1$s) se zyada hai. Phir bhi poori raqam khate mein darj hogi — mehfooz karne se pehle raqam dekh lein.
Mansooba delete ho gaya. Jo adaigiyan khate mein darj ho chukein wo wahein rahengi — raqam waqai wasool hui thi.
Mansooba hata diya jayega, lekin darj shuda adaigiyan khate mein rahengi. Wo raqam waqai wasool hui thi, aur bandobast delete karne se wo wapas nahi hoti.
Supplier ka wajib aap ke khate mein rehta hai, baqi sab ki tarah. Bill oopar kaghazi record jorta hai: bill number, batch number, expiry tareekhein.
Abhi koi supplier bill nahi.\n\nJo khareedein usey darj karein — batch number aur expiry ke saath. Yehi inspector poochta hai, aur yehi maal ko shelf par kharab hone se bachata hai.
Ye sirf us waqt lagayen jab fori ada kiya ho. Warna raqam aap ke khate mein un ke hisaab par jayegi, jo aap ka wajib hai.
Ye aap ke khate mein ek entry ke tor par %2$s ke wajib mein %1$s jor dega.
Dabbe par likha batch number darj karein. Agar kabhi namoone par sawal ho, ya Mehkma Zaraat pooche, to yehi record batata hai maal kahan se aaya. Baad mein ye dobara nahi ban sakta.
Roshan Khata expiry se 60 din pehle khabardar karega — itna pehle ke maal bech sakein, riayat de sakein, ya wapas kar sakein jab tak supplier le le.
Bill mehfooz ho kar khate mein darj ho gaya
Meherbani kar ke product ka naam likhein
Bill delete ho gaya. Khate ki entry rahegi — maal waqai aaya tha aur raqam waqai wajib hai.
Bill aur is ke batch record hat jayenge, lekin khate ki entry rahegi. Maal waqai aaya tha aur raqam waqai wajib hai — kaghaz delete karne se ye wapas nahi hota.
Bechein, riayat dein, ya wapas karein — jab tak waqt hai
Agle 60 dinon mein kuch expire nahi ho raha.\n\nSirf wahi maal dekha ja sakta hai jis ki expiry darj ho. Bill par wo khana khali chhorenge to Roshan Khata khabardar nahi kar sakega.
Sirf expiry darj shuda maal yahan aata hai. Roshan Khata sirf usi se khabardar kar sakta hai jo isey bataya gaya.
Agar namoone par sawal ho ya inspector pooche, yahan batch number talash karein — kis supplier se, kis bill par, aur kab aaya.
Is batch number ka koi maal nahi mila.

Yahan mehfooz hua:

%1$s

Ye aap ko phone ke Downloads folder aur kisi bhi file manager mein milega. Roshan Khata apni copy bhi rakhta hai, taake file dhoonde baghair bahal kar sakein.
Roshan Khata ke andar mehfooz hua. Is screen se kabhi bhi bahal kar sakte hain.

Aap ke poore karobar ki PDF \u2014 balance, cheque, mansoobay, expire hota maal. Parhne, print karne, ya kisi ko dikhane ke liye.\n\nYe backup NAHI hai. Roshan Khata PDF se record bahal nahi kar sakta.

Aap ke gahakon ke naam, number aur balance kabhi nahi bheje jate. Report ke saath sirf app version aur phone model jata hai \u2014 yehi kharabi dhoondne mein madad deta hai.\n\nEmail aap ki apni mail app mein khulti hai, is liye bhejne se pehle aap dekh sakte hain ke kya ja raha hai.
Koi balance ya raqam ghalat lagi
Koi mehfooz cheez ghayab ho gayi
Urdu ya English mein likhein \u2014 jo aasan ho. Jab kharabi hui aap kya kar rahe the?
maslan Main ne Rs 5,000 ka cheque shamil kiya aur clear karne se pehle hi balance badal gaya.
Ye aap ki email app kholega. Agar email set nahi, to kisi bhi phone se innovation313.support@gmail.com par likhein.
Koi email app nahi mili. Meherbani kar ke innovation313.support@gmail.com par likhein
Jari rakhne ke liye kahin bhi chhuyein

Aap ka data wapas aa gaya.\n\nIs backup ke %1$d gahak backup banne se pehle delete ho chuke the, is liye wo Recycle Bin mein bahal hue hain \u2014 markazi list mein nahi. Mazeed \u2192 Recycle Bin kholein, wahan se kisi ko bhi mukammal bahal kar sakte hain.

Apna Google account jorein to aap ka Khata aap ki APNI Google Drive mein khudkar backup hota rahega. Phone badlein, dobara sign in karein, sab wapas. Data aap ki Drive mein rehta hai; hamare paas kabhi nahi aata.
%1$s ke tor par jura hai. Aakhri cloud backup: %2$s
%1$s ke tor par jura hai. Abhi koi cloud backup nahi \u2014 "Drive Mein Backup" dabayen.
Drive mein backup ho raha hai\u2026
Aap ki Google Drive mein backup ho gaya.
Cloud backup nakaam. Pichla backup, agar tha, mehfooz hai. Internet dekh kar dobara koshish karein.
Drive se bahal ho raha hai\u2026
Aap ki Google Drive mein abhi koi backup nahi mila.
Drive se bahali nahi ho saki. Internet dekh kar dobara koshish karein.
Google sign-in mukammal nahi hua. Dobara koshish karein.
Roshan Khata ko aap ki Drive mein apne folder mein mehfooz karne ki ijazat chahiye. Pooche jane par ijazat dein.
Ye app ki maujooda har cheez ko aap ki Google Drive ke backup se badal dega. Jari rakhein?
Aap ki dukaan mein kya chal raha hai
Sab Se Zyada Bikne Wali Cheezein
Farokht ka pehla mahina \u2014 muwazne ke liye abhi kuch nahi.
Is mahine koi product darj nahi. Entry karte waqt product ka naam likhein to ye nazar aayega.
Is mahine abhi koi farokht darj nahi.
Sab hisaab aap ke phone par hota hai. Kuch bhi phone se bahar nahi jata.
Chandi ka nisab: 612.36 gram (52.5 tola) chandi. Ye kam hadd hai, is liye zyada logon par Zakat aati hai \u2014 ye mauqif aam tor par ghareebon ke haq mein zyada mohtat samjha jata hai.
Sone ka nisab: 87.48 gram (7.5 tola) sona. Ye oonchi hadd hai, is liye kam logon par Zakat aati hai. Kaun sa miyaar aap par lagoo hai, aalim se tasdeeq karein.
Ye entry khate se hata di jayegi.
Raseed ki tasveer nahi ban saki
Zaban kabhi bhi "Mazeed" se badal sakte hain.
